note.name: undulats are social animals
note.text: undulds are known to need partner, otherwise they are depressed

note.name: What GPU should I get in 2026?
note.text: HI, I am PC enthusiast and I like to play PUBG. What GPU is best for that?

note.name: What CPU is most value in 2026?
note.text: Hello, I am building a new PC, and I am looking for best value CPU for gaming in 2026.
